---
name: Task
about: Create a task to track work that needs to be done
title: "<type>(<scope>): <description>"
labels: task
assignees: ''

---

**Objective**
What needs to be done? (1-2 sentences)

**Details**
Context, motivation, and any constraints.

**Affected Components**
- `package`: component or file

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2

**Dependencies**
Related issues or blockers (if any).

---

> **Before starting work**, assignee must respond with implementation plan and test cases.
> Use the [Assignee Response Template](https://github.com/rekise/robotics-forum/blob/main/docs/assignee-response-template.md).
